rules.description: PO Review Stories with all subtasks Done → BA Analysis
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Story') AND status in ('PO Review')

rules.description: BA Analysis Stories → generate Acceptance Criterias
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Story') AND status in ('BA Analysis')

rules.description: Solution Architecture Stories → generate Solution Design
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Story') AND status in ('Solution Architecture')

rules.description: Subtasks with 'q' label → trigger PO refinement
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Subtask') AND labels in ('q')

rules.description: Backlog Stories → ask clarification questions
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Story') AND status in ('Backlog')

rules.description: Ready For Development Stories → trigger story_development
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Story') AND status in ('Ready For Development')

rules.description: Ready For Development Bugs → trigger bug_development
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Bug') AND status in ('Ready For Development')

rules.description: In Review Stories & Bugs → trigger pr_review
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Story', 'Bug') AND status in ('In Review')

rules.description: In Review Stories & Bugs (pr_approved) → retry merge
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Story', 'Bug') AND status in ('In Review') AND labels = 'pr_approved'

rules.description: In Rework Stories & Bugs → trigger pr_rework
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Story', 'Bug') AND status in ('In Rework')

rules.description: Merged Stories → Ready For Testing + generate test cases
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Story') AND status in ('Merged')

rules.description: Merged Bugs → Ready For Testing
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Bug') AND status in ('Merged')

rules.description: Ready For Testing Bugs → generate test cases
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Bug') AND status in ('Ready For Testing')

rules.description: In Testing Stories → check all TCs passed → Done
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Story') AND status in ('In Testing')

rules.description: In Testing Bugs → check all TCs passed → Done
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Bug') AND status in ('In Testing')

rules.description: Backlog Test Cases → In Development + automate
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Test Case') AND status in ('Backlog')

rules.description: In Review Test Cases → trigger pr_test_automation_review
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Test Case') AND status in ('In Review - Passed', 'In Review - Failed')

rules.description: In Rework Test Cases → trigger pr_test_automation_rework
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Test Case') AND status in ('In Rework')

rules.description: Failed Test Cases → create or link bug
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Test Case') AND status in ('Failed')

rules.description: Bug To Fix Test Cases → all linked Bugs Done → move to Backlog
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Test Case') AND status in ('Bug To Fix')

rules.description: Failed Test Cases → check if all linked Bugs are In Testing → Re-run
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Test Case') AND status in ('Failed')

rules.description: Re-run Test Cases → run existing test → Passed / Failed / In Review
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Test Case') AND status in ('Re-run')
